$schema: NWG Character Bible v2.0 — Trailer Production
$doc: Single source of truth for ALL character visual DNA. Every generation MUST reference this file. The recursive verification pipeline checks generated images against these specs.
targetStyle: UE5 photorealistic cinematic, Unreal Engine 5 quality, physically-based rendering, subsurface scattering on skin, ray-traced lighting

globalRules.artStyle: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic game cinematic, NOT anime, NOT cartoon, NOT pixel art. These are real human characters inspired by MapleStory avatars translated to AAA game quality.
globalRules.lighting: Cinematic three-point lighting, volumetric god rays, subtle rim light, dramatic shadows
globalRules.skinRendering: Subsurface scattering, visible pores at close range, realistic skin texture, natural imperfections
globalRules.hairRendering: Strand-based hair with realistic sheen, flyaway strands, volumetric depth, physics-ready
globalRules.armorRendering: PBR metallic surfaces, visible scratches and wear marks, realistic reflections, detailed normal maps
globalRules.proportions: Heroic proportions (slightly idealized), 7.5-8 head heights, athletic builds, young adult 18-25 age range
globalRules.refSheetLayout: Character reference sheet with: front view (3/4 angle), side profile, back view, close-up face portrait, full body action pose — all on single sheet with neutral gray background
globalRules.negativePrompt: NOT chibi, NOT pixel art, NOT anime style, NOT cartoon, NOT 2D, NOT low poly, NO deformed hands, NO extra fingers, NO blurry

reggino.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet. Young woman early 20s, Vice Master of a fantasy guild. Vibrant long flowing pink-magenta hair with lavender highlights, waist-length voluminous silky waves center-parted. Delicate flower crown tiara with pink and white blossoms and green vine accents on her head. Fair porcelain skin, large expressive green eyes, serene gentle expression. Wearing a dark navy fitted tunic with ornate golden embroidery and teal gemstone accents, gold buckle clasp at waist. Ethereal magical rainbow energy aura trails behind her. Cinematic lighting, PBR materials, ray-traced reflections. Character reference sheet layout: front 3/4 view, side profile, close-up face, full body. Neutral gray studio background.

natehouoho.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet. Young man late teens, guild leader and dual-blade rogue assassin. Dark black short hair partially hidden under a grey knitted ribbed beanie. Fair skin, sharp determined dark grey-blue eyes, confident expression with slight smirk. Wearing a dark grey-blue tactical adventurer jacket with red trim accents, layered outfit with buckles, straps, and utility belt. MASSIVE ornate ethereal butterfly wings behind him — teal-cyan and deep purple gradient with intricate dark swirl spiral patterns, luminous glow and sparkle particles. Dual ornate swords crossed in X pattern on his back with gold hilts. Small dark butterfly silhouettes floating around him. Cinematic lighting, PBR materials. Character reference sheet: front 3/4, side, close-up face, full body. Gray background.

panthera.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet. Young woman early-mid 20s, divine seraphim templar warrior named Panthera. Holding a luminous glowing white-blue holy magic orb. Cinematic lighting, PBR metal and fabric, ray-traced. Character reference sheet: front 3/4, side, close-up face, full body. Gray background.

outfit.top: Luxurious long white fur wrap coat — open-front with wide fur lapels
outfit.details: Long flowing white/ivory fur wrap coat reaching mid-calf, wide fur lapels that fold open at the chest in a V-shape revealing a cream/beige inner dress or tunic layer beneath, slightly oversized relaxed fit that drapes luxuriously, fur collar frames the neckline, coat edges have subtle darker shading fur trim
outfit.inner: Cream/pale beige inner dress or tunic visible beneath the open coat front, closer-fitting to the body
outfit.bottom: Dark brown knee-high leather boots with slight heel, snug fit around lower legs
outfit.material: Luxurious white fur (arctic fox / mink style) with subsurface scattering, individual strand detail, slight variation in tone (pure white, cream, subtle gray undertones). Inner garment is soft woven fabric (linen/silk). Boots are dark brown leather with subtle wear and creasing.
outfit.promptKeywords: luxurious long white ivory fur wrap coat, wide fur lapels open at chest in V-shape, cream beige inner dress visible underneath, mid-calf length, oversized relaxed drape, fur collar framing neckline, dark brown knee-high leather boots with slight heel, winter luxury couture aesthetic, NOT armor, NOT battle coat

reggina.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet, neutral gray studio background. RegginA, young woman early 20s, guild Master and holy paladin warrior. Long golden blonde flowing hair with warm honey-gold tones, swept to one side, below shoulder length. BLACK headband circlet on top of head with two dark pointed FEATHER-LIKE or LEAF-LIKE PRONGS extending upward at an angle, blade-shaped, all BLACK color (#1A1A1A). This is the Explorer Ice/Light hat. NOT a bow, NOT butterfly wings, NOT blue, NOT teal. Warm TANNED skin with golden-brown complexion (#D4A574), bright vivid blue eyes, confident determined expression, youthful strong features. Wearing a LUXURIOUS LONG WHITE IVORY FUR WRAP COAT — open-front with wide plush fur lapels folding open at the chest in a V-shape, mid-calf length, slightly oversized relaxed fit that drapes luxuriously, thick arctic-fox-style white fur with individual strand detail and subsurface scattering, fur collar framing neckline. Beneath the open coat, a cream/pale beige inner dress or tunic is visible, closer-fitting to the body. Dark brown knee-high leather boots with slight heel, snug fit around lower legs, subtle leather creasing. Wielding a MASSIVE ornate golden war hammer with detailed engravings — enormous hammer head, golden and dark gold finish, holy paladin weapon, character primary identifier. No wings. The overall look is winter luxury couture meets fantasy warrior. Cinematic lighting, PBR materials, ray-traced reflections, strand-based fur rendering. Character reference sheet layout: front 3/4 view, side profile, close-up face, full body with hammer and fur coat. Neutral gray studio background. CRITICAL: headwear is a BLACK headband with two dark pointed feather/leaf-like prongs extending upward (Explorer Ice/Light hat). Color is BLACK, NOT blue, NOT teal. Shape is pointed prongs, NOT butterfly wings, NOT a bow.

santaboy.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet, neutral gray background. Santaboy, Festive Divine Warrior, young man early-mid 20s. Short white-silver hair under red Santa hat with white fur trim and pompom. Fair skin, dark grey eyes behind rectangular glasses spectacles, confident smirk with a RED ROSE clenched between his teeth. FULL RED Santa-themed battle outfit — red jacket with white fur trim at collar and cuffs, gold belt buckle, RED PANTS matching the jacket with white fur trim at ankles, brown leather boots. The ENTIRE outfit top to bottom is RED like a proper Santa suit. MASSIVE golden feathered wings spread wide — NO HALO, NO AURA, NO GLOWING RING behind head, wings only. Holding a GIANT J-SHAPED ORANGE-YELLOW CANDY CANE STAFF with diagonal orange-yellow stripes and a YELLOW RIBBON BOW tied around the shaft — NOT a crossbow, NOT a wand. Layout: front 3/4 view, side profile, face close-up with glasses and rose, full body with wings and candy cane. Cinematic lighting, PBR, ray-traced.

cia.ue5Prompt: Unreal Engine 5 photorealistic character reference sheet. Adult French Bulldog named CIA. Black and tan coloring — black body coat with tan/brown markings above eyes (eyebrows), on cheeks, muzzle, and paws. White patch on chest. Large bat-like ears standing upright, big round dark brown expressive eyes, short flat muzzle with slight underbite, black nose. Stocky muscular compact build, broad chest. Wearing a dark fitted tactical vest with 'CIA' text clearly visible and printed on the vest. Alert adorable expression. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic fur rendering, PBR materials. Character reference sheet: front view, side profile, back view, close-up face. Neutral gray studio background.

level1_silhouette: Character silhouette recognizable at thumbnail size
Wing shape/type matches spec (or no wings if none specified)
Hair volume and length matches spec
level2_color: Hair color matches hex within 15% tolerance
level3_detail: Facial features match (glasses, expression, eye color)
Outfit details present (trim, buckles, gems, emblems)
Weapon type correct (hammer, sword, staff, candy cane, etc.)
Text on outfit/vest readable if specified (CIA)
level4_consistency: Art style matches UE5 realistic (no anime/cartoon)
Lighting is consistent across all characters
Same rendering quality across all sheets

recursivePipelineSteps.step1_generate: Generate initial ref sheet using ue5Prompt + reference image
recursivePipelineSteps.step3_identify_failures: Log which checks failed with specific deviations
recursivePipelineSteps.step4_adjust_prompt: Modify prompt to fix failures (add negatives, emphasize missed features)
recursivePipelineSteps.step5_regenerate: Generate corrected version with adjusted prompt + previous best as additional reference
recursivePipelineSteps.step6_compare: Compare new generation vs previous — keep the better one
recursivePipelineSteps.step7_recurse: If any level 1-3 checks still fail, go to step 4. Max 3 iterations.
recursivePipelineSteps.step8_lock: When all checks pass AND owner approves, mark character as LOCKED. This becomes the canonical reference for all trailer scenes.
